columns.name: dem_sap
columns.label: SAP/NHC
columns.description: SAP code associated with the patient.

columns.name: ttm_stat
columns.label: Prior antineoplasic medications
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has received any prior systemic antineoplastic treatment.

columns.name: ttm_setting
columns.label: Settings
columns.description: Therapeutic setting of the treatment within the disease course (e.g. neoadjuvant, adjuvant, metastatic).

columns.name: ttm_castration_status
columns.label: Castration Status
columns.description: Castration status of the patient at the time of antineoplastic therapy initiation (hormone-sensitive vs castration-resistant prostate cancer).

columns.name: ttm_met_line_num
columns.label: Metastatic line
columns.description: Number line of therapy in the metastatic setting.

columns.name: ttm_intention
columns.label: Intention
columns.description: Therapeutic intent of the treatment (curative, palliative, etc.).

columns.name: ttm_vh
columns.label: Treatment administered at VH?
columns.description: Indicates whether treatment was administered at VH center.

columns.name: ttm_type
columns.label: Type of treatment
columns.description: Type or modality of antineoplastic treatment administered.

columns.name: ttm_setting_adj_type
columns.label: Adjuvant regimen type
columns.description: Specific type of adjuvant treatment regimen.

columns.name: ttm_name
columns.label: Treatment name
columns.description: Name of the treatment regimen administered.

columns.name: ttm_type_name
columns.label: Type of treatment regimen
columns.description: Detailed name of treatment regimen subtype.

columns.name: ttm_hemonc_type
columns.label: HEMONC Type of treatment regimen
columns.description: HEMONC code for the regimen or treament.

columns.name: ttm_protocol_name
columns.label: Protocol/Regimen name
columns.description: Protocol or regimen identifier/name.

columns.name: ttm_startdate
columns.label: Treatment start date
columns.description: Date when treatment was initiated.

columns.name: ttm_finished
columns.label: Treatment finished?
columns.description: Indicates whether the treatment course has been completed.

columns.name: ttm_enddate
columns.label: Treatment end date
columns.description: Date when treatment ended.

columns.name: ttm_num_cycles
columns.label: Total number of cycles
columns.description: Total number of treatment cycles administered.

columns.name: ttm_bestresponse
columns.label: Best response
columns.description: Indicates the best level of treatment response or disease progression during therapy.

columns.name: ttm_best_response_date
columns.label: Best response date
columns.description: Date of best documented response.

columns.name: ttm_endreason
columns.label: Reason for discontinuation of therapy
columns.description: Reason for discontinuation of treatment.

columns.name: ttm_endreason_other
columns.label: Other Reason for discontinuation of therapy
columns.description: Another reason for treatment discontinuation that it is not listed above.

columns.name: ttm_pd
columns.label: Has the disease progressed?
columns.description: Indicates whether disease progression occurred.

columns.name: ttm_pddate
columns.label: Date of progression
columns.description: Date of documented disease progression.

columns.name: ttm_qtrt_conc
columns.label: Concurrent chemo with neoadjuvant RT?
columns.description: Indicates if the neoadjuvant radiotherapy  is administered concomitantly with chemotherapy.

columns.name: ttm_tnt
columns.label: TNT administered?
columns.description: Indicates whether total neoadjuvant therapy (TNT) was administered.

columns.name: ttm_tnt_type
columns.label: Type of TNT regimen
columns.description: Type of TNT regimen administered.

columns.name: ttm_tnt_type_other_regimen
columns.label: Other type of TNT regimen
columns.description: Another TNT regimen administered that it is not listed above.

columns.name: ttm_tnt_response
columns.label: TNT response
columns.description: Clinical response to TNT treatment.

columns.name: ttm_ww
columns.label: Patient undergo W&W?
columns.description: Indicates whether watch-and-wait strategy was applied.

columns.name: ttm_qt_opra_mix_startdate
columns.label: Chemotherapy start date in TNT OPRA mix regimen
columns.description: Date of the first chemotherapy administration within the TNT OPRA regimen.

columns.name: ttm_qt_opra_mix_enddate
columns.label: Chemotherapy end date in TNT OPRA mix regimen
columns.description: Date of the last chemotherapy administration within the TNT OPRA regimen.

columns.name: ttm_rt
columns.label: Radiotherapy regimen
columns.description: Radiotherapy regimen type.

columns.name: ttm_rt_dosis
columns.label: Radiotherapy dosis
columns.description: Radiotherapy dose administered.

columns.name: ttm_ad_int
columns.label: Adjuvant treatment timing
columns.description: Indicates the timing of adjuvant treatment, whether adjuvant therapy is planned after primary tumor surgery OR after M1 (metastatic) surgery

columns.name: ttm_qt_drug
columns.label: Chemotherapy treatment type (DRUG)
columns.description: Chemotherapy drugs administered.

columns.name: ttm_qt_type
columns.label: Chemotherapy regimen type
columns.description: Classification of chemotherapy regimen.

columns.name: ttm_qt_drug_other
columns.label: Other chemotherapy regimen type
columns.description: Other chemotherapy drugs not listed.

columns.name: ttm_biologic
columns.label: Biologic regimen
columns.description: Type of biologic therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_biologic_other
columns.label: Other biologic regimen
columns.description: Other type of biologic theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_vegf
columns.label: VEGF regimen
columns.description: Type of VEGF therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_vegf_other
columns.label: Other VEGF regimen
columns.description: Other type of VEGF theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_egfr
columns.label: EGFR regimen
columns.description: Type of EGFR therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_egfr_other
columns.label: Other EGFR regimen
columns.description: Other type of EGFR theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_it
columns.label: Immunotherapy regimen
columns.description: Type of immunotherapy administered.

columns.description: Type of PD1 therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_it_pd1_other
columns.label: Other Anti-PD1
columns.description: Other type of PD1 theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_it_pdl1
columns.label: Anti-PDL1
columns.description: Type of PDL1 therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_it_pdl1_other
columns.label: Other Anti-PDL1
columns.description: Other type of PDL1 theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_it_ctla4
columns.label: Anti-CTLA4
columns.description: Type of CTLA4 therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_it_ctla4_other
columns.label: Other Anti-CTLA4
columns.description: Other type of CTLA4 theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_it_lag3
columns.label: Anti-LAG3
columns.description: Type of LAG3 therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_it_lag3_other
columns.label: Other Anti-LAG3
columns.description: Other type of LAG3 theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_it_regimen_other
columns.label: Other immunotherapy treatment
columns.description: Another type of immunotherapy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_target
columns.label: Target regimen
columns.description: Type of targeted therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_target_braf
columns.label: BRAF inh
columns.description: Type of BRAF therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_target_braf_other
columns.label: Other BRAF inh
columns.description: Other type of BRAF theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_target_mek
columns.label: MEK inh
columns.description: Type of MEK therapy administered

columns.name: ttm_target_mek_other
columns.label: Other MEK inh
columns.description: Other type of MEK theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_target_parp

columns.description: Type of DDR or PARP therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_target_parp_other
columns.label: Other DDR / PARP inh
columns.description: Other type of DDR or PARP theraphy not listed.

columns.label: Other PI3K inh

columns.name: ttm_target_idh

columns.description: Type of IDH therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_target_fgfr2
columns.label: FGFR inh
columns.description: Type of FGFR therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_target_fgfr_other
columns.label: Other FGFR inh
columns.description: Other type of FGFR  theraphy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_target_cdk
columns.label: CDK 4/6inh
columns.description: Type of CDK4/6 therapy administered.

columns.label: Other CDK 4/6 inh

columns.description: Type of mTOR therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_target_kras
columns.label: KRAS inh
columns.description: Type of KRAS therapy administered.

columns.name: ttm_target_kras_other
columns.label: Other KRAS inh
columns.description: Other type of KRAS theraphy not listed

columns.name: ttm_target_other
columns.label: Other target therapy
columns.description: Another type of target therapy not listed.

columns.name: ttm_adc
columns.label: ADC
columns.description: Antibody-drug conjugate treatment administered.

columns.name: ttm_adc_other
columns.label: Other ADC
columns.description: Another type of antibody-drug conjugate not listed.

columns.name: ttm_ht
columns.label: Hormone therapy type
columns.description: Hormone therapy agents administered.

columns.name: ttm_ht_other
columns.label: Other hormone therapy
columns.description: Another type of hormone therapy agents not listed.

columns.name: ttm_ht_switch
columns.label: Hormone therapy switch?
columns.description: Indicates whether hormone therapy switch occurred.

columns.name: ttm_ct_name
columns.label: Clinical trial name
columns.description: Name of the clinical trial.

columns.name: ttm_ct_mol_match
columns.label: Is this a molecular matched clinical trial?
columns.description: Indicates whether the clinical trial is a molecularly matched trial.

columns.name: ttm_nct_code
columns.label: Clinical trial NCT code
columns.description: Clinical trial registry identifier (NCT code).

columns.name: ttm_ct_drug
columns.label: Clinical trial regimen/drugs
columns.description: Drugs or regimen used in clinical trial.

columns.name: ttm_ct_masking
columns.label: Clinical trial - Masking
columns.description: Indicates wheher the clinical trial is masked (blinded) and, if applicable, the level of masking.

columns.name: ttm_ct_drug_mechanism
columns.label: Clinical trial drug mechanism
columns.description: Indicates the mechanism of action of the investigational drug used in the clinical trial.
